category.description: The world stage for professional Teamfight Tactics.

description.body: We’re back with more info on the four NA Regional Qualifier events and NA Regional Finals that will headline the competitive ecosystem for Set 4 TFT in North America, as well as early details on where you can tune in!

title: Announcing TFT Set 4 NA Qualifier 1

category.title: Esports
category.description: The world stage for professional Teamfight Tactics.

description.body: The North American Teamfight Tactics Esports team is excited to announce its partnership with Wisdom for the first of four Regional Qualifier Events that will kick off the competitive ecosystem for Set 4 TFT in North America.
